overview.description: Largest IT training school in the Czech and Slovak market, offering 2,000+ courses including 34 AI-focused courses
overview.description_long: GOPAS (Počítačová škola GOPAS) is the largest IT training provider in the Czech and Slovak market, training nearly 30,000 students annually. Founded in 1992, the company offers 2,000+ courses covering IT infrastructure, cybersecurity, AI/ML, data engineering, cloud, programming, and business applications. As a Microsoft Gold Certified Partner (first educational center in CZ/SR), EC-Council ATC, CompTIA, Red Hat, VMware, and AWS authorized training partner, GOPAS holds a broad portfolio of vendor authorizations. It offers 34+ AI courses under categories including AI for users, AI for managers, AI for administrators and programmers, and AI security. The company also organizes major IT conferences including TechEd, HackerFest, JavaDays, and the newly launched AI Day.
overview.tagline: Největší poskytovatel IT školení v České a Slovenské republice

history.origin_story: Founded in 1992 as a computer training school in Prague. Legally incorporated as GOPAS, a.s. in April 1996. Grew over three decades to become the dominant IT training provider in the Czech and Slovak markets.

key_milestones.event: GOPAS founded as a computer training school in Prague
Legally registered as GOPAS, a.s.; ISO 9001 certification obtained; MŠMT accreditation for IT requalification
Brno branch opened; Prometric Testing Centre accreditation obtained
First Microsoft Certified Gold Partner for Learning Solutions in CZ and SR; TechEd conference (DevCon) launched
Slovak subsidiary GOPAS SR, a.s. founded in Bratislava
Microsoft Partner of the Year for Learning (LLPA); pivot to online course delivery during COVID-19
ISO 27001 certification for information security management obtained
Relocation to new Prague HQ at Na Strži 63, Praha-Krč with 24 computer classrooms; AI Day conference launched

awards: Microsoft Gold Certified Partner for Learning Solutions — first in CZ and SR (2002)
EC-Council Circle of Excellence ATC (multiple years: 2012, 2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2019)
EC-Council William Ischanoe Circle of Excellence Instructor (2013, 2014, 2015, 2016, 2017, 2019)
Microsoft Partner of the Year for Learning 2020 (LLPA)
EC-Council Best Newcomer of the Year 2012

risk_assessment.agi_displacement_rationale: AI-powered self-paced learning and AI tutors could reduce demand for instructor-led training over time. However, GOPAS's core value lies in accredited, vendor-authorized certification training (Microsoft, EC-Council, CompTIA) that requires authorized training centers — a structural moat that AI cannot easily replicate.
risk_assessment.market_risk_rationale: IT training is a large, stable market with consistent enterprise demand for certified professionals. GOPAS holds a dominant position in CZ/SK with 30,000+ annual students, 30+ years of operation, and exclusive/authorized partnerships with all major IT vendors.
risk_assessment.funding_risk_rationale: Self-sustaining for 30+ years since 1992 with no external funding needed. Revenue is diversified across 2,000+ courses and a broad student base. The company is fully bootstrapped and cash-flow positive.
risk_assessment.overall_risk_rationale: GOPAS is a mature enterprise with a dominant market position, deep vendor authorization moats, and 30+ years of profitable operation. Growing AI adoption is actually increasing demand for its AI training courses rather than displacing its core business.

metadata.notes: GOPAS is primarily an IT training company, not an AI builder. It appears in the CNAIP catalog due to its AI training offerings (34 AI courses, newly launched AI Day conference). Founded 1992 (30th anniversary in 2022), legally registered as a.s. in April 1996. Employee count is estimated; actual figure not publicly available. Note: a small 'GOPAS a.s.' entity (gopas.eu, 5 LinkedIn employees) appears to be a distinct company from the main training school (gopas.cz). Customer count of 30,000 refers to annual students, not unique enterprise customers.
